Package org.eventb.core.tests.pom

Class TestLib

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.pom.TestLib
public class TestLib extends Object
This is a collection of static methods for conveniently constructing objects used for testing using their string counterparts.

  • Constructor Details

    • TestLib

      public TestLib()

  • Method Details

    • genSeq

      public static IProverSequent genSeq(FormulaFactory ff, String sequentAsString)
      Constructs a simple sequent (only with selected hypotheses and a goal) from a string of the form "shyp1 ;; shyp2 ;; .. ;; shypn |- goal"

      The type environment of the sequent should be inferrable from the predicates in the order in which they appear (eg. "x+1=y ;; x=y |- x/=0" is fine, but "x=y ;; x+1=y |- x/=0" is not since "x=y" cannot be typechecked alone)

      This method is used to easily construct sequents for test cases.
      Parameters:
      ff - The factory used to parse the sequent
      sequentAsString - The sequent as a string
      Returns:
      The resulting sequent, or null in case the sequent could not be constructed due to a parsing or typechecking error.

    • genProofTreeNode

      public static IProofTreeNode genProofTreeNode(FormulaFactory ff, String str)

    • genPred

      public static Predicate genPred(FormulaFactory ff, String str)
      Generates a type checked predicate from a string. The type environment must be completely inferrable from the given predicate. (eg. "x=x" will not work since the type of x is unknown)
      Parameters:
      ff - The factory used to parse the predicate
      str - The string version of the predicate
      Returns:
      The type checked predicate, or null if there was a parsing of type checking error.

    • genPreds

      public static Set<Predicate> genPreds(FormulaFactory ff, String... strs)
      A Set version of genPred(FormulaFactory, String)
      Parameters:
      strs -
      Returns:
      a set of predicates
